title: Property Consultant - Embassy Office Parks REIT - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Embassy Office Parks REIT - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!
